questions.question: Describe the difference between a hardwired digital circuit and a programmable digital circuit. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Focus on the key characteristics of each type of circuit

questions.question: What is the purpose of a Digital-to-Analog Converter (DAC)? Explain the process of how a DAC converts binary digital signals to continuous-time analog signals.
questions.hint: Describe the mathematical process involved in the conversion

questions.question: Compare and contrast the advantages and disadvantages of using binary numbers versus hexadecimal numbers in digital design and computer organization.
questions.hint: Focus on the implications for coding and design
